summary: Frontend testing of 12 new metric detail pages complete. All metrics have proper definitions, formulas, evaluations, best/worst performers, and expert quotes. DSO, DPO, and Cash Conversion Cycle formulas verified correct (CCC = DSO + DIO - DPO).

issues: Values displayed with 'x' suffix instead of '%' for percentage metrics (36.88x should be 36.88%, 63.12x should be 63.12%)

critical_code_review_comments: MetricDetail.js is well-structured with comprehensive metric definitions (~1200 lines)

All 12 new metrics properly defined with: whatMeasures, reasoning, relevance, formula (with numerator, denominator, expression, variables), evaluation (5 levels), bestPerformers, worstPerformers, expertQuote

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all 12 new metric detail pages working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 new metric detail pages fully functional: asset_turnover, dso, dpo, cash_conversion_cycle, quick_ratio, cash_ratio, working_capital, nopat_margin, roce, debt_to_assets, equity_ratio. Each page includes definition sections (¿Qué mide?, Razonamiento, Relevancia, Fórmula, Métricas relacionadas), 5-level evaluation scale, best/worst performer industries, and expert quotes. CCC formula correctly shows DSO + DIO - DPO. Minor display issue with percentage metrics showing 'x' suffix.
